testcase.name: Authentication › TC-AUTH-01: standard user can log in successfully
Authentication › TC-AUTH-02: login page has correct title
Authentication › TC-AUTH-03: login fields are visible and focusable
Authentication › TC-AUTH-04: locked out user sees error message
Authentication › TC-AUTH-05: empty username shows validation error
Authentication › TC-AUTH-06: empty password shows validation error
Authentication › TC-AUTH-07: wrong password shows error message
Authentication › TC-AUTH-08: error banner can be dismissed
Authentication › TC-AUTH-09: password field masks input
Authentication › TC-AUTH-10: user can log out and is redirected to login
Authentication › TC-AUTH-11: unauthenticated user cannot access inventory directly
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-01: empty cart shows no items
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-02: added product appears in cart
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-03: multiple added products all appear in cart
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-04: item prices in cart match inventory prices
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-05: removing item from cart removes it from the list
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-06: Continue Shopping returns to inventory
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-07: Checkout button navigates to checkout step 1
Shopping Cart › TC-CART-08: cart persists items after navigating back to inventory
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-01: checkout step 1 loads with info form
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-02: missing first name shows error
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-03: missing last name shows error
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-04: missing postal code shows error
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-05: valid info proceeds to step 2
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-06: cancel on step 1 returns to cart
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-07: step 2 shows ordered items
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-08: step 2 total = subtotal + tax
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-09: subtotal matches sum of item prices
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-10: completing checkout shows order confirmation
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-11: Back Home button after order returns to inventory
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-12: cart is empty after successful order
Product Inventory › TC-INV-01: inventory page shows 6 products
Product Inventory › TC-INV-02: each product has a name, description, price and image
Product Inventory › TC-INV-03: each product has an Add to Cart button
Product Inventory › TC-INV-04: sort A-Z orders products alphabetically
Product Inventory › TC-INV-05: sort Z-A orders products in reverse alphabetical order
Product Inventory › TC-INV-06: sort low-to-high orders products by ascending price
Product Inventory › TC-INV-07: sort high-to-low orders products by descending price
Product Inventory › TC-INV-08: adding a product increments the cart badge
Product Inventory › TC-INV-09: adding multiple products updates badge count correctly
Product Inventory › TC-INV-10: Add to Cart button changes to Remove after adding
Product Inventory › TC-INV-11: removing a product decrements the cart badge
Product Inventory › TC-INV-12: clicking a product name navigates to its detail page
Product Inventory › TC-INV-13: cart icon navigates to cart page

Authentication › TC-AUTH-03: login fields are visible and focusable

Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-04: missing postal code shows error
Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-05: valid info proceeds to step 2

Product Inventory › TC-INV-07: sort high-to-low orders products by descending price

Product Inventory › TC-INV-10: Add to Cart button changes to Remove after adding
Product Inventory › TC-INV-11: removing a product decrements the cart badge
Product Inventory › TC-INV-12: clicking a product name navigates to its detail page
Product Inventory › TC-INV-13: cart icon navigates to cart page
